cons: Limited horizontal scaling for high traffic

pros: High performance with dedicated AKS nodes
Premium services for low-latency AI inference
Robust security with Private Endpoints and Defender
Strong security with Private Endpoints and HSM encryption

recommendation_reasoning: SACA best balances GDPR compliance, security, and cost. It uses Azure-native services with Private Endpoints and HSM encryption to meet strict security requirements, while EU data residency ensures GDPR compliance. The cost ($2,868/month) is within budget and provides robust audit logging via Sentinel. While POA offers better performance, its $29k/month cost far exceeds the $6,250/month budget. COA is too cost-effective and lacks the security/audit depth needed for enterprise compliance.
